name: Cornmeal Sally Lunn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the buttermilk and sour cream to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated into a smooth batter.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
